qa.overall_assessment: BA analysis is sound. Root cause correctly identified in agents/cleaner.md, evidence is concrete and file-verified, reference source is tier_2_verified with correct line range, scope coverage accounts for all push-gate writers/readers, novelty check is valid, and token schema is correctly derived. One minor schema observation (push.md reader schema vs session_id field) is not a blocker. Success criteria in context JSON are executable and specific. Dev may proceed.

out_of_scope_observations.observation: push.md documents token content as {commit_sha, branch, repo_root} (3 fields) but changelog-analyst.md Phase 10 and BA spec both specify 4 fields including session_id. push.md documentation is a simplified/incomplete description of the actual token schema.
hooks/push.sh is a token reader/validator but was not listed in BA's scope_expansion.all_occurrences. Not a writer; not modified by this cycle.

ba_validation_dimensions.assessment: BA's measured.value cites concrete artifact references with file paths and line numbers: agents/cleaner.md:95-105 (git commit, no token write), agents/changelog-analyst.md:451 (Nothing to commit after exclusions exit), commands/push.md:53-59 (push-gate token required), commands/clean.md:589 (broken text). QA independently verified all four. Evidence is not vague; all claims are backed by direct file reads at stated line numbers.

User verbatim requirement: '将这个结尾工作流也加入到clean的适配'. BA's Must Have correctly identifies agents/cleaner.md (token write) and commands/clean.md:589 (text simplification). R2 correctly classified N/A. No universal scope claim silently dropped. Won't Have list correctly bounded.

Failure chain fully traced (commit.md:39 → changelog-analyst.md:451 → push.md:63-66). Insertion point correctly identified. Canonical algorithm located and read. diagnosis_completeness honestly notes 'inferred only' — appropriate for a non-UI doc change.

Both modification targets verified: agents/cleaner.md exists with Git Operations section at lines 93-103 (no token write). clean.md:589 contains exact broken text. changelog-analyst.md Phase 10 at lines 292-303 confirmed as the canonical algorithm. No phantom files listed.

No drift. Technical Hints algorithm is directly derived from and matches the canonical source. AC verification recipes (static file reads/greps) are executable as written and appropriate for a non-UI cycle.

root_cause_verification.rationale: BA correctly identifies agents/cleaner.md Section 5 Git Operations as the location missing the push-gate token write. QA verified by direct read: lines 95-103 contain only a plain git commit instruction with no token write step. The causal chain (cleaner commits → changelog-analyst finds nothing to commit → Phase 10 never runs → token absent → /push rejects) is accurate and confirmed by file reads.
